tree_hash_algorithm: SHA-256 over each base-commit blob in repository-relative POSIX path order: path_utf8 + NUL + git_mode_ascii + NUL + git_show_blob_bytes + NUL

workflow_job.extraction: From the unindented jobs payload, include the job header at two-space indentation through the byte before the next two-space job header, or EOF.
workflow_job.raw_text:
max-contracts-and-artifacts:
    name: max-contracts-and-artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"
      - name: Install schema validator
        run: python -m pip install jsonschema
      - name: Run unit contracts and adversarial artifact tests
        run: python -B -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v
      - name: Validate Max source and registry anchors
        run: |
          python scripts/check_crossframe_max_v6_full_source.py --repo .
          python scripts/check_crossframe_max_v6_registry_anchors.py --repo .
